headline: A Look At Las Vegas Sands (LVS) Valuation After Mixed Recent Share Price Performance
summary: Las Vegas Sands stock snapshot after recent performance Las Vegas Sands (LVS) has drawn fresh attention after a recent mix of short term gains and longer term declines, with the share price at $54.17 and a market value of about $36.9b. Over the past week, the stock showed a small positive return, while moves over the month and past 3 months were negative, and the year to date performance also reflected a decline.
